form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last outing finished third of 11 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3450m, 7 len behind Opera Light with 68kg at $11. Start before raced on the pace then finished second of 7 starters at this track on March 1 over 3500m, 3.5 len behind Montana Dream with 67kg at $7.50. Prospects look very bright.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Impressive in recent runs. Last outing finished third of 11 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3450m, 7 len behind Opera Light with 68kg at $11. Start before raced on the pace then finished second of 7 starters at this track on March 1 over 3500m, 3.5 len behind Montana Dream with 67kg at $7.50. Prospects look very bright.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation 4 in a small field at Fontainebleau December 9 over 3600m, slow track; 8 len behind Macarena Du Rib with 69kg at $3.40. First race start won by 1.3 len Clairefontaine July 28 over 3400m slow track defeating Ma Star Sivola carrying 66kg at $6.70. Has found a suitable race for return and can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished fourth of 8 runners at this track on March 1 over 3500m, 66 len behind Micawber carrying 70kg at $5.80. Second-up rolled along in front setting the pace and then edged out finished second of 8 starters at this track on March 18 over 3500m, on slow going 1.3 len behind No Stress Ever carrying 71.5kg at $12. Prefer to see him do a bit more.

form.formComment: Last outing fell at Moulins on March 21 over 3800m. Before that finished third of 7 starters at this track on March 1 over 3500m, 6 len behind Montana Dream carrying 64kg at $15. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished fifth of 9 runners at Angers on February 24 over 3400m, on slow going 43 len behind Major Du Large carrying 70kg at $10. Last start won by 1.3 len this track on March 18 over 3500m slow track defeating Escort'man carrying 66kg at $28 in a hurdle. Must be a chance again.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth of 7 runners at Fougeres on March 22 over 4200m, 36 len behind Merci Royal with 67kg. Start before finished seventh of 12 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, slow track; 11 len behind Normandy Man with 66.5kg at $110. Can make stronger cases for others.
